author: Samuel Vaillant
subject: test(createManagerRaw): follow convention adopted in the other tests (algolia/react-instantsearch#1827)
body:
* test(createManagerRaw): follow convention adopted in the other tests

* test(createManagerRaw): drop controlled client

* test(createManagerRaw): drop promise for updateClient

* test(createManagerRaw): use async/await + setImmediate to flush micro tasks

* test: use consistent naming for runAllMicroTasks

* test: use consistent naming for runOnlyNextMicroTask
